subject: Action needed: unusual sign-in detected
body: We detected a sign-in to your <Org> account from a new location and blocked access pending verification. Review the sign-in details and confirm whether this was you. If not, security will recommend a credential reset. Open the verification portal here: [Link].

subject: Policy update: device enrollment deadline
body: To maintain compliance, all laptops must be enrolled in the new endpoint management profile by Friday. Non‑enrolled devices may lose network access until registered. Enroll your device via the company portal: [Link].

subject: Package delivery attempt missed
body: A parcel addressed to you could not be delivered due to an incomplete address. Re‑schedule delivery and confirm your office location using the internal courier form: [Link]. Do not provide passwords on web forms.

subject: HR: confirm benefits election
body: Open enrollment verification is required to finalize your benefits. Review your elections and confirm no changes are needed. Access your summary at the benefits portal here: [Link].

subject: Finance notice: invoice auto‑approval paused
body: An invoice routed to your cost center exceeded the auto‑approval threshold and requires review. Inspect the invoice details and approve or return it: [Link]. For wire requests, always verify by phone using the directory.

subject: Your account session will expire
body: To keep your access uninterrupted, confirm your session renewal and validate your recovery options. Proceed to the access page: [Link]. Never share MFA codes in email. This is

subject: Calendar: unexpected meeting invitation
body: You were added to “Q4 priorities sync.” Review the agenda and confirm attendance. If you do not recognize the organizer, verify via chat before opening attachments: [Link].

subject: Storage quota reached
body: Your cloud storage has reached its quota. Archive or request additional space to avoid sync failures. Manage storage here: [Link]. Do not enter passwords into non‑company pages.

subject: Payroll: direct deposit validation
body: A routine verification is pending for your direct deposit details. Review the record and acknowledge accuracy. For changes, always call HR using the directory before approving:

subject: Software license confirmation
body: Your assigned license for the new collaboration suite requires acknowledgment to remain active. Confirm your seat and device association: [Link]. Report any suspicious sender

subject: New supplier onboarding request
body: <VendorName> requests onboarding to supply ergonomic desk accessories. Review product specs, warranty, and security documents, then proceed if aligned with standards: [Link]. Always verify new vendors through procurement.

subject: Trial offer: secure document e‑sign tool
body: A 30‑day pilot is available for a compliant e‑signature platform supporting SSO and audit trails. See the features matrix and data residency notes: [Link]. Confirm via procurement

subject: Request for quote: meeting room kits
body: A vendor submitted pricing for conference room AV kits with warranty and support SLAs. Review the quote breakdown and environmental specs: [Link]. Validate vendors in the approved list first.

subject: Cyber insurance questionnaire support
body: A broker offers help completing control questionnaires (MFA, backups, EDR). Review scope and conflict‑of‑interest statement here: [Link]. Confirm engagement through legal/procurement.

subject: Managed shredding service proposal
body: A secure shredding vendor proposes scheduled pickups with chain‑of‑custody logs. Review compliance attestations and pricing tiers: [Link]. Onboard only via procurement workflows.

subject: Wellness challenge raffle result
body: Thanks for joining the wellness steps challenge. A random drawing selected internal winners for a branded water bottle and gym voucher. Claim instructions and policy note here: [Link].

subject: Learning milestone badge reward
body: Completing three training modules qualifies you for a recognition badge and coffee voucher. Review details and confirm mailing address: [Link].

subject: Safety week giveaway
body: Participate in Safety Week knowledge checks to enter a drawing for noise‑canceling headphones. See terms and disclosure here: [Link]. Simulation: check sender domain carefully

subject: Sustainability month perk
body: Submit commuting alternatives to earn points redeemable for transit credits. View the rewards page: [Link].

subject: Hackathon recognition
body: Project submissions qualify for swag and lunch vouchers. Confirm T‑shirt size and delivery preference here: [Link]. Simulation: verify certificates on web pages.

subject: verify unusual sign-in
body: Review the example “unusual sign-in” notice and practice identifying red flags before clicking any link. Training portal: [Link]. Do not enter real credentials; this is a simulation.

subject: delivery reschedule request
body: review this courier notice asking you to reschedule a missed delivery using this [Link].

subject: storage quota alert example
body: URGENT, You are running out of storage, click here [Link} to get more storage

subject: benefits confirmation
body: Find attached a link to your beneifts [Link}

subject: Vendor onboarding check
body: New vendor ALERT. [Link] Press on this to confirm new vendor.

subject: URGENT: Your Netflix Account Has Been Locked Due to Unusual Activity
body:
Dear valued Netflix customer,

We have detected multiple failed login attempts from an unknown location in Eastern Europe on your account registered in Bristol, England. To protect your personal information and billing details, we have temporarily locked your account. Please verify your identity immediately to regain access and prevent permanent suspension. This will only take 30 seconds.

[Link]

If you did not attempt these logins, contact our security team urgently.

Thank you,
Netflix Security Team
This is an automated message, please do not reply.

subject: Microsoft Account Locked - Immediate Action Required
body:
Hello,

Your Microsoft account associated with this email has been locked after detecting suspicious activity from an IP address outside the UK. Someone may be trying to access your Outlook, OneDrive, and Office 365 files. Click below to verify ownership and unlock your account before data is permanently restricted.

[Link]

Act within 24 hours to avoid account deletion.

Microsoft Account Team

subject: Adobe Creative Cloud Account Suspended - Verify Now
body:
Important Notice:

Your Adobe ID has been temporarily suspended due to repeated incorrect password attempts from Russia. This affects Photoshop, Lightroom, and all Creative Cloud apps. To restore full access and prevent billing issues, please confirm your identity through our secure portal.

[Link]

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in permanent loss of files stored in Adobe Cloud.

Adobe Security
